title: The Sweethearts Who Vanished in the Woods

scenes.text: A romantic getaway turned chilling mystery.
It happened in Milwaukee, during a camping trip.
In 1976, a young couple disappeared without a trace while camping.
Despite searches, no evidence has surfaced.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED CASE

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Milwaukee, USA - 1976. A young couple vanished while camping, leaving families and authorities in a desperate search for answers. Follow for daily cold cases!
